lvgl.version=9.1.0
lvgl.tag=v9.1.0
lvgl.commit=e1c0b21b2723d391b885de4b2ee5cc997eccca91
platform=host_macos
display_backend=sdl2
input_backend=sdl2
toolchain=Apple clang version 21.0.0 (clang-2100.0.123.102)
arch=arm64
sdl2.version=2.32.10
sdl2.cflags=-I/opt/homebrew/include/SDL2 -D_THREAD_SAFE
sdl2.libs=-L/opt/homebrew/lib -lSDL2
freetype.version=2.14.3
render_mode=direct
renderer=accelerated
frame_period_ms=16
cache_size=8mb
demo_widgets=enabled
local_assets=enabled
filesystem=stdio:A
image_decoders=lodepng,tjpgd,bmp
font_loader=freetype,tiny_ttf_file
lv_conf_hash=2a22488eb95b262d32760142a68c1128e03af68490b3985034cac918acb87b05
lib_hash=9e191b0464cdfe896fe0c370f81cb6722ec225c04558555900606776461a665c
